hook.summary: Showcase of the DualSense controller followed by high-fidelity game footage.
hook.visual_action: The controller appears in a glowing blue frame, transitioning to a cinematic close-up of a character.

scene_flow: Introduction of the DualSense controller with 'Unmissable Immersion on PC' messaging.
Cinematic montage of Death Stranding 2 gameplay and release date.
Graphic overlay explaining haptic feedback and adaptive trigger features.
High-octane action sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 on a motorcycle.
Final branding shot with 'PC READY' and the PlayStation logo.
on_screen_text: BRING SELECT GAMES TO LIFE WITH HAPTIC FEEDBACK + ADAPTIVE TRIGGERS
audience_proxy: Core PC gamers who prioritize high-fidelity graphics and immersive haptic technology.
